title: BBQ TOOLSET 3PCS
description: BBQ Toolset 3pcs Introducing our BBQ Toolset 3pcs, the essential companion for your outdoor grilling adventures. Let's explore the key features and specifications of this toolset: Durable Construction: The BBQ Toolset is made from a combination of stainless steel and wood, ensuring durability and long-lasting performance. The stainless steel components are resistant to rust and corrosion, while the wooden handles provide a comfortable grip and insulation from heat. Versatile Tools: The set includes three essential BBQ tools: Metal Turner with Opener: This tool has a length of 51 cm and a width of 10 cm. It features a sturdy metal turner for flipping and moving food on the grill, and it also includes an integrated bottle opener for added convenience during your BBQ gatherings. Tongs: The tongs have a length of 49.5 cm, providing a safe distance from the heat. They are perfect for flipping burgers, sausages, or any other grilled delicacies with precision and ease. Fork: The fork has a length of 49 cm, allowing you to easily handle and lift larger pieces of meat or vegetables on the grill. Convenient Size: The BBQ Toolset has a compact size of 10 × 51 cm, making it easy to store and transport. It won't take up much space in your kitchen or outdoor storage area, and you can easily bring it along to picnics, camping trips, or tailgate parties. Product Specifications: Size: 10 × 51 cm Material: Stainless steel, Wood Colour: Black Upgrade your BBQ game with our BBQ Toolset 3pcs. The durable stainless steel and wood construction, along with the versatile tools, ensure you have everything you need for a successful grilling session. The long handles provide safety and comfort, allowing you to handle hot food without getting too close to the heat.
